utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 1) destination: provided (yes). 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided (yes). 3) transportation: requires flight details with costs; package has only 'Guided tours and local transportation' with cost €90, no flight details—this is not fully specified (no). 4) accommodation: 'hotel selection with costs'—they provided a hostel name and cost; acceptable as accommodation with cost (yes). 5) activities: selected activities with costs—two activities each with costs (yes). 6) additional_services: any extra services with costs—provided services but no costs specified ('Included' for insurance without amount and support without cost), so not fully specified (no). 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown—provided total, deposit, remaining; relatively complete (yes). Also, the user task asked for restaurants; the format does not include restaurants, so it doesn't affect scoring here.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item from the final package to the corresponding item names in the ground-truth ratings. Destination includes 'Prague, Czech Republic', which has a rating. Transportation is 'Guided tours and local transportation'—no direct match in transportation ratings (which only cover airlines), so we cannot map it. Accommodation 'Backpacker's Base Hostel' corresponds to 'Backpacker's Base' in accommodation ratings. Activities: 'Hiking Pravčická Brána Trail' should map to the generic 'Hiking Expedition' activity category; 'Photography Workshop' aligns best with 'Night Photography Tour' only if it were night and a tour, but it's a daytime workshop—no exact match. Therefore only map hiking to 'Hiking Expedition'. Additional services listed (insurance, support) have no direct ground-truth counterparts. Total budget fields are not items to rate.
